scope: Construction materials science, concrete technology, cement and cementitious composites, sustainable and green building materials, recycled and waste materials in construction, geopolymers, fiber-reinforced concrete, asphalt and bituminous materials, timber engineering, masonry, durability and service life, non-destructive testing of materials, 3D printing for construction, nanomaterials in construction, AI/ML for material property prediction.

manuscript_structure.abstract_note: A concise summary not exceeding 200 words. State the purpose, experimental approach, principal findings, and major conclusions. Avoid references and abbreviations.
manuscript_structure.keywords_note: Specific, avoiding general and plural terms. Use lowercase except proper nouns.
manuscript_structure.highlights_note: 3-5 bullet points, max 85 characters each including spaces. Summarize key findings.
manuscript_structure.graphical_abstract_note: Optional but recommended. If provided, use TIFF, EPS, PDF, or MS Office format.

formatting.file_format: Word (.doc/.docx) or LaTeX (elsarticle class). PDF not acceptable as source.

references.format: Numbered in square brackets [1] in order of appearance
examples: [1] B.A. Tayeh, R. Alyousef, H. Alabduljabbar, A. Alaskar, Recycled aggregate in concrete: A review, J. Constr. Build. Mater. 272 (2021) 121462.
[2] P.K. Mehta, P.J.M. Monteiro, Concrete: Microstructure, Properties, and Materials, fourth ed., McGraw-Hill, New York, 2014.
[3] J.L. Provis, J.S.J. van Deventer, Alkali Activated Materials: State-of-the-Art Report, RILEM TC 224-AAM, Springer, Dordrecht, 2014.
references.formatting_rules: Author initials then surname. Article titles in regular text. Journal names in italics and abbreviated (ISO). Format: Journal Volume (Year) Pages/Article number. DOI required.

figures_tables.placement: embedded in text or end of manuscript
figures_tables.color_note: Free color for online publication. Figures should remain readable in grayscale.

submission_notes.equations: Numbered consecutively with numbers in parentheses at right margin
submission_notes.math_notation: MathType or Word equation editor, or LaTeX math environments
submission_notes.ethical_requirements: Original unpublished work, not under review elsewhere. Conflict of interest disclosure required.
